final:
module PageTable (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we,  
    input wire [3:0] v_addr,  
    input wire [3:0] frame_num,  
    output reg [3:0] p_frame  
);  
    reg [3:0] page_table [0:15];  // Page table with 16 entries  

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin page_table[v_addr] <= frame_num ; // Write frame number to page table
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  p_frame <= page_table[v_addr] ;
  end  
endmodule
